title: Cannot get info for "certbot" - unauthorized
body:
I am trying to get some information on the official certbot image, but am running into unauthorized errors.

```
$ skopeo --override-os=linux inspect docker://docker.io/certbot
FATA[0000] Error parsing image name "docker://docker.io/certbot": Error reading manifest latest in docker.io/library/certbot: errors:
denied: requested access to the resource is denied
unauthorized: authentication required
```

I can see that Certbot is on Docker Hub here: https://hub.docker.com/r/certbot/certbot

Should I be using a different form?
Am I using the wrong URL?

comments.body: It looks like you need to login to get access to this image.

Docker gets the same error:
```
docker pull docker.io/certbot
Using default tag: latest
Error response from daemon: pull access denied for certbot, repository does not exist or may require 'docker login': denied: requested access to the resource is denied
```
